mapper.select:
SELECT SCREEN_ID, SCREEN_URL, GRID_TYPE, (EXCEL_OPTION, 'A') AS EXCEL_OPTION FROM STOCSCRN WHERE GATE_CD = '100' #{ses.gateCd}
AND DEL_FLAG != 1

SELECT ACTION_CD AS "actionCd", BUTTON_ICON_NM AS "btnIcon", (INVISIBLE_FLAG, '0') AS "invisibleFlag", CASE WHEN FP_EQ_FLAG = '1' THEN 'EQ' WHEN FP_EO_FLAG = '1' THEN 'EO' WHEN FP_EI_FLAG = '1' THEN 'EI' WHEN FP_ETC_TEXT = '1' THEN 'ETC' ELSE '' END AS "fpFlag", CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCMBTA WHERE GATE_CD = A.GATE_CD AND SCREEN_ID = A.SCREEN_ID AND ACTION_CD = A.ACTION_CD AND ((DATA_TYPE = 'U' AND DATA_CD = #{userId} ) OR (DATA_TYPE = 'J' AND DATA_CD IN (SELECT CTRL_CD FROM STOCBACP WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND CTRL_USER_ID = #{userId} AND USE_FLAG = '1' AND DEL_FLAG = '0') )) AND DEL_FLAG = '0' ) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS "buttonAuth", MULTI_NM AS "buttonCaption" FROM ( SELECT SCAC.GATE_CD, SCAC.SCREEN_ID, SCAC.ACTION_CD, SCAC.BUTTON_ICON_NM, SCAC.INVISIBLE_FLAG, SCAC.FP_EQ_FLAG, SCAC.FP_EI_FLAG, SCAC.FP_EO_FLAG, SCAC.FP_ETC_TEXT, MULG.MULTI_NM FROM STOCSCAC SCAC JOIN STOCMULG MULG ON(SCAC.GATE_CD = MULG.GATE_CD AND SCAC.SCREEN_ID = MULG.SCREEN_ID AND SCAC.ACTION_CD = MULG.ACTION_CD AND MULG.LANG_CD = #{langCd} AND MULG.MULTI_CD = 'SA' AND MULG.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE SCAC.GATE_CD = '100' #{ses.gateCd}
AND SCAC.SCREEN_ID = #{screenId} AND SCAC.DEL_FLAG = '0' ) A

SELECT CODD.CODE_TYPE, CODD.CODE , CODD.CODE_DESC , CODD.TEXT1 , CODD.TEXT2 , CODD.TEXT3 , CODD.TEXT4 FROM STOCCODH CODH , STOCCODD CODD WHERE CODH.GATE_CD = CODD.GATE_CD AND CODH.CODE_TYPE = CODD.CODE_TYPE AND CODH.LANG_CD = CODD.LANG_CD AND CODH.GATE_CD = (#{ses.gateCd}, '100') AND CODH.CODE_TYPE = #{CODE_TYPE} AND CODH.LANG_CD = CASE WHEN #{LANG_CODE} != null and #{LANG_CODE} != '' THEN #{LANG_CODE} ELSE 'KO' END AND CODD.USE_FLAG = '1' AND CODH.USE_FLAG = '1' AND CODD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND CODH.DEL_FLAG = '0' ORDER BY
TO_NUMBER(CODD.SORT_SQ)
CAST(CODD.SORT_SQ AS INT)
, UPPER(CODD.CODE_DESC)

SELECT CODE_TYPE FROM STOCCODH WHERE GATE_CD = '100' #{ses.gateCd}
AND DEL_FLAG = 0
mapper.sql:
SELECT COLUMN_ID AS "columnId" ,COLUMN_TYPE AS "columnType" ,COMMON_ID AS "commonId" ,MULTI_CONTENTS AS "text" ,(CASE WHEN EDIT_FLAG = '1' THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END) AS "editable" ,(CASE WHEN ALIGNMENT_TYPE = 'C' THEN 'center' WHEN ALIGNMENT_TYPE = 'L' THEN 'left' WHEN ALIGNMENT_TYPE = 'R' THEN 'right' ELSE 'left' END) AS "align" ,CASE WHEN FONT_COLOR_TEXT = 'I' THEN '0|0|255' ELSE '' END AS "fontColor" ,CASE WHEN BACK_COLOR_TEXT = 'E' THEN '220|254|194' WHEN BACK_COLOR_TEXT='O' THEN '246|254|252' ELSE '' END AS "backgroundColor" ,CASE WHEN (BACK_COLOR_TEXT, '') = '' THEN 'D' ELSE BACK_COLOR_TEXT END AS "essential" ,DATA_TYPE AS "dataType" ,LANG_CD AS "langCd" ,IMAGE_NM AS "imageName" ,MULTI_TYPE AS "multiType" ,DYNAMIC_COLUMN_FLAG AS "dynamicColumn" ,(CASE WHEN TEXT_WRAP = '1' THEN 'explicit' ELSE 'ellipse' END) AS "textWrap", ,MASK_TYPE AS "maskType"
,TO_CHAR(COLUMN_WIDTH) AS "width" ,TO_CHAR(MAX_LENGTH) AS "maxlength"
,CAST(CAST(COLUMN_WIDTH AS INT) AS NVARCHAR(MAX)) AS "width" ,CAST(MAX_LENGTH AS NVARCHAR(MAX)) AS "maxlength"
FROM STOCLANG WHERE GATE_CD = '100' #{ses.gateCd}
AND USE_FLAG = '1' AND DEL_FLAG = '0'
mapper.select:
SELECT Z.* FROM (SELECT A.COLUMN_ID AS "columnId" ,A.COLUMN_TYPE AS "columnType" ,A.COMMON_ID AS "commonId" ,A.MULTI_CONTENTS AS "text" ,(CASE WHEN A.EDIT_FLAG = '1' THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END) AS "editable" ,(CASE WHEN A.ALIGNMENT_TYPE = 'C' THEN 'center' WHEN A.ALIGNMENT_TYPE = 'L' THEN 'left' WHEN A.ALIGNMENT_TYPE = 'R' THEN 'right' ELSE 'left' END) AS "align" ,CASE WHEN A.FONT_COLOR_TEXT = 'I' THEN '0|0|255' ELSE '' END AS "fontColor" ,CASE WHEN A.BACK_COLOR_TEXT = 'E' THEN '220|254|194' WHEN A.BACK_COLOR_TEXT='O' THEN '246|254|252' ELSE '' END AS "backgroundColor" ,CASE WHEN (A.BACK_COLOR_TEXT, '') = '' THEN 'D' ELSE A.BACK_COLOR_TEXT END AS "essential" ,A.DATA_TYPE AS "dataType" ,A.LANG_CD AS "langCd" ,A.IMAGE_NM AS "imageName" ,A.MULTI_TYPE AS "multiType" ,(CASE WHEN A.DYNAMIC_COLUMN_FLAG = '1' THEN A.DYNAMIC_COLUMN_FLAG ELSE '0' END) AS "dynamicColumn" ,CC.FROZE_FLAG AS "frozeFlag" ,A.MASK_TYPE AS "maskType" ,CASE WHEN (CC.COLUMN_WIDTH, A.COLUMN_WIDTH) = 0 THEN 999 ELSE (CC.SORT_SQ, A.SORT_SQ) END AS SORT_SQ ,A.DECIMAL_YN AS "decimalYn"
,TO_CHAR((CC.COLUMN_WIDTH, A.COLUMN_WIDTH)) AS "width" ,TO_CHAR(A.MAX_LENGTH) AS "maxlength"
,CAST(CAST((CC.COLUMN_WIDTH, A.COLUMN_WIDTH) AS INT) AS NVARCHAR(MAX)) AS "width" ,CAST(A.MAX_LENGTH AS NVARCHAR(MAX)) AS "maxlength"
FROM STOCLANG A LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCUSCC CC ON (A.GATE_CD = CC.GATE_CD AND A.SCREEN_ID = CC.SCREEN_ID AND A.LANG_CD = CC.LANG_CD AND A.MULTI_CD = CC.MULTI_CD AND A.FORM_GRID_ID = CC.FORM_GRID_ID AND CC.USER_ID = #{ses.userId} AND CC.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE A.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND A.USE_FLAG = '1' AND A.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND A.FORM_GRID_ID = #{gridId} AND A.SCREEN_ID = #{screenId} AND A.LANG_CD = #{langCd} AND A.MULTI_TYPE = 'G' ) Z ORDER BY SORT_SQ

AND FORM_GRID_ID = 'btn' AND SCREEN_ID = 'BUTTON' AND LANG_CD = 'KO' #{langCd}
AND MULTI_TYPE = 'B' ORDER BY SORT_SQ
SELECT SQL_TEXT

SELECT SQL_TEXT ,TYPE_CD ,AUTO_SEARCH_FLAG ,COMMON_ID ,LIST_ITEM_CD ,SHRINK_TO_FIT
,TO_CHAR(WINDOW_WIDTH) AS WINDOW_WIDTH ,TO_CHAR(WINDOW_HEIGHT) AS WINDOW_HEIGHT
,CAST(WINDOW_WIDTH AS NVARCHAR(MAX)) AS WINDOW_WIDTH ,CAST(WINDOW_HEIGHT AS NVARCHAR(MAX)) AS WINDOW_HEIGHT
, MULTI_CD AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND COMMON_ID = #{commonId}

, ACTION_CD
AND SCREEN_ID = #{screenId}
AND SCREEN_ID = #{screenId}
, TMPL_MENU_CD

SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCSCBM WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND TMPL_MENU_CD = #{tmplMenuCd} AND USER_ID = #{ses.userId} ) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "isBookmarked" ,CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCATCH WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND UUID = ( SELECT HELP_ATT_FILE_NUM FROM STOCSCRN WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND SCREEN_ID = #{screenId})) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCTXTH WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND TEXT_NUM = ( SELECT HELP_TEXT_NUM FROM STOCSCRN WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND SCREEN_ID = #{screenId})) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "hasHelp" ,CASE WHEN ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM STOCLANG WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND SCREEN_ID = #{screenId} AND LANG_CD = #{ses.langCd} AND MULTI_TYPE = 'G' AND COLUMN_WIDTH > 0 AND INVISIBLE_FLAG = '0' AND USE_FLAG = '1' AND DEL_FLAG = '0') > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "hasGrid"

SELECT
CODD.CODE_DESC AS MODULE_NM , GETMULTINAME(#{ses.gateCd}, 'MT', #{ses.langCd}, MUTM.HIGH_TMPL_MENU_CD, '-') AS HIGH_TMPL_MENU_NM , GETMULTINAME(#{ses.gateCd}, 'MT', #{ses.langCd}, MUTM.TMPL_MENU_CD, MUTM.SCREEN_ID) AS TMPL_MENU_NM FROM STOCMUTM MUTM LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCCODD CODD ON (CODD.GATE_CD = mutm.GATE_CD AND CODD.CODE_TYPE = 'M009' AND CODD.LANG_CD = #{ses.langCd} AND CODD.CODE = mutm.MODULE_TYPE AND CODD.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE MUTM.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND MUTM.TMPL_MENU_CD = #{tmpl_menu_cd} AND MUTM.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND MUTM.USE_FLAG = '1'
